name: Yūji Koseki
description: {{nihongo|'''Yūji Koseki'''|古関 裕而|Koseki Yūji|August 11, 1909 – August 18, 1989}} was a Japanese ''[[ryūkōka]]'', ''[[gunka]]'', [[march (music)|march]], [[fight song]] and [[film score]] [[composer]]. His real name was also Yūji Koseki, but its [[kanji]] was 古關 勇治. For his contributions in music to baseball, he was inducted into the [[Japanese Baseball Hall of Fame]] in 2024.
